name: Black Bottom Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line muffin cups with paper baking cups.
3. In a small bowl, combine cream cheese, 1/3 cup sugar, and egg; mix well. Stir in chocolate chips; set aside.
4. In a large bowl, combine flour, 1 cup sugar, cocoa, baking soda, and salt. Add water, oil, vinegar, and vanilla; beat for 2 minutes at medium speed.
5. Fill prepared muffin cups about halfway full. Top each with a tablespoonful of the cream cheese mixture.
6. Combine almonds and 2 tablespoons sugar; sprinkle evenly over the cream cheese mixture.
7. Bake for 20-30 minutes or until the cream cheese mixture is light brown. Cool for 15 minutes, then remove from pans. Cool completely. Refrigerate leftovers.
